outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The structure it’s so beautifully sculpted.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And even if it wasn’t a metaphor

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Does everything need to be extraordinarily deep and complex?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I don’t think so too!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: God, I didn't think we could have something in common.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Hum, this one, I actually have it in my collection

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: It’s definitely… an intense experience.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I… hum, just didn’t get the time to finish yet.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: It’s quite long isn’t it?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I actually think it’s quite slim, less than a hundred pages.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I think I finished it in, like, one day.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The thing is that I’m a slow reader, yes.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I like to deeply analyse every word and sentence.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: But this one is so objective…

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I don’t think there’s much to analyse, honestly.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Uh… I, maybe I was too caught up on finding a meaning that I distracted myself.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Oh that happens to me all the time!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: We could read it together so we don’t get distracted.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Do you want to read it with me?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I suppose we could arrange that.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I’ll make some time on my agenda.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I believe that, being with you, I could finally finish it.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Oh that’d be so nice!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: In the end we can talk about our opinions of everything

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The thing is that I’m a slow reader, yes.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I don’t remember the last time anyone made an effort to learn more about me or my opinions.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: It’s somewhat refreshing… I must say.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Having someone around who doesn’t want to kill me.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I have many people who don’t want to kill me!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I think if you got to know them

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: They wouldn’t wanna kill you too.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Maybe they’d wanna be friends!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I highly doubt that, hero.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: What? Are you too afraid to even try?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I just think it might be… improductive.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: However, I’ll reflect on it.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Okay, I’ll be going home for today then.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I just want you to know it won’t be a complete bother if you decide to show up tomorrow again.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Are you inviting me to hang out?!

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: …Make of that what you will.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I’m merely stating that I’m not busy.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Did you read it, really?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I quite like this one actually.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You, in fact, have a good taste in literature at least.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: I’ve never met anyone who liked it too

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And honestly, that’s such a shame.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Why this masterpiece keeps being underrated, I’m not sure.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Maybe it’s prejudice because of the genre.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Yes! And people keep saying that it’s shallow and way to girly, like

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: And what in this god forsaken world would be the problem with that, you know?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: This point of view is literally misogynistic hands down

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: And for it being shallow

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: They just don’t get the metaphor.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You took the words right out of my mouth, hero

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Look who it is once again, the mighty hero…

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Don’t you have anything better to do with your limited lifespan?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I don’t have anywhere else I'd rather be.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: Being by your side is fulfilling enough.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: You… you…  you do seem to be expressing yourself better these days, did you…

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS:  I may be stretching too far, but did you happen to read a book or something?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: …Really? I read a lot, actually.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: Oh pardon me, I do find that very hard to believe.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: In fact, I’d be surprised to learn that  you actually know how to read at all.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: You’d never understand the ways of my mind.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: If you do know how to read, tell me truthfully, what is your favorite book?

outputs.name: next
outputs.value: BOSS: I may be stretching too far, but did you happen to read a book or something?

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: BOSS: The structure it’s so beautifully sculpted.

outputs.name: dialogue
outputs.value: HERO: I know how to read, I'm doing so right now!
